ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* Unique identifier (tconst) for the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "averagerating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "numvotes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the movie */,
  "domestic_gross" TEXT /* Domestic gross revenue of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the movie */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the movie's release */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer of the movie */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDb ID of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the studio */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the studio */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the studio */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the studio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the studio record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the studio record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last modified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
